A

AuthService - Class in Unnamed Package
Provides authentication services for cashier and manager employees.
AuthService() - Constructor for class AuthService
 

C

CashierApp - Class in Unnamed Package
Graphical cashier interface for creating customer orders, managing cart items, applying drink options, and submitting transactions to the database.
CashierApp(LauncherApp.DbCreds, UserSession) - Constructor for class CashierApp
Creates the cashier application window for the logged-in employee.

equals(Object) - Method in record class LauncherApp.DbCreds
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

F

firstName() - Method in record class UserSession
Returns the value of the firstName record component.
fullName() - Method in record class UserSession
Returns the employee's full display name.

H

hashCode() - Method in record class LauncherApp.DbCreds
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class UserSession
Returns a hash code value for this object.

I

id() - Method in record class UserSession
Returns the value of the id record component.
isCashier() - Method in record class UserSession
Checks whether the active employee is a cashier.
isManager() - Method in record class UserSession
Checks whether the active employee is a manager.

L

lastName() - Method in record class UserSession
Returns the value of the lastName record component.
LauncherApp - Class in Unnamed Package
Launches the Team 25 point-of-sale application.
LauncherApp() - Constructor for class LauncherApp
 
LauncherApp.DbCreds - Record Class in Unnamed Package
 
loginEmployee(Connection, String, int) - Static method in class AuthService
Authenticates an employee without requiring a PIN.
loginEmployee(Connection, String, int, String) - Static method in class AuthService
Authenticates an employee using role, employee ID, and optional PIN.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class LauncherApp
Application entry point.
ManagerApp - Class in Unnamed Package
Graphical manager dashboard for viewing inventory, employees, products, sales information, and generated business reports.
ManagerApp(LauncherApp.DbCreds, UserSession) - Constructor for class ManagerApp
Creates the manager dashboard window for the logged-in manager.

P

pass() - Method in record class LauncherApp.DbCreds
Returns the value of the pass record component.

R

relaunchToEmployeeLogin(JFrame, LauncherApp.DbCreds) - Static method in class LauncherApp
Closes the current application window and returns the user to the employee login flow.
role() - Method in record class UserSession
Returns the value of the role record component.

T

toString() - Method in record class LauncherApp.DbCreds
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class UserSession
Returns a string representation of this record class.

U

url() - Method in record class LauncherApp.DbCreds
Returns the value of the url record component.
user() - Method in record class LauncherApp.DbCreds
Returns the value of the user record component.
UserSession - Record Class in Unnamed Package
Represents an authenticated employee session.

Creates an instance of a UserSession record class.
